---
title: "Rafael N. Magalhães"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: assets/logo.png
  image-width: 45%
  image-shape: "rectangle"
---

I'm a data scientist with [experience](about.html) in predictive modeling, causal inference and analytics. Here you will find information on some of my [projects](projects.html) and material for my [courses](teaching.html).
